response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer across multiple high-profile companies (Naver, Tencent, MercadoLibre, etc.), with over 12 years in the field—well exceeding the 6+ years required. His expertise spans TypeScript, Node.js, React, and other primary stack technologies, along with Kotlin/Java for backend services. He demonstrates strong problem-solving, architectural skills, and leadership in AI-agent development, testing frameworks, and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes). His open-source contributions and educational initiatives further highlight his proficiency and innovation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (12+ years) with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS/GCP), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes)
Proven leadership in open-source projects, mentorship, and technical workshops
concerns: Primary stack expertise is strong, but secondary languages (Kotlin/Java) are less frequently mentioned in recent roles
Limited explicit mention of Vitest (testing framework) in recent projects, though he has experience with Jest and Playwright
Some roles (e.g., Tencent) are less aligned with the enterprise automation tooling focus of the role

key_factors.factor: Fullstack experience and primary stack proficiency
